title: Pinterest Q2 2021 Earnings Beat Strong Growth
text: Pinterest beat analyst expectations with adjusted earnings per share of 25 cents versus a forecast of 13 cents, and revenue of $613 million compared to the expected $562.1 million. The company provided a third-quarter revenue growth estimate in the low-40s on a year-to-year basis, which was approximately in line with Refinitiv expectations of 42.8% year-to-year revenue growth for the upcoming quarter. The earnings report demonstrated significant outperformance relative to analyst estimates, with both earnings and revenue substantially beating expectations. The strong performance was driven by robust advertiser spending and improved monetization across the platform.
